Selection Reference Points

Toolbar / Icon:
       
Menu: Snap > Selection Reference Points
Shortcut: S, K
Commands: snapselectioncenter | sk

Description

Snaps to one of nine reference points of the bounding box around the current selection: the four corners, the middle points of the four edges or the center. The point closest to the mouse cursor is used. This snap tool is useful for moving, copying or otherwise aligning a selection relative to the grid or to other entities, for example to place the center or a corner of the selection at a specific position.
